title: Breathtaking Cinematic Scene Beautiful Young Woman Long
sourceTitle: Breathtaking Cinematic Scene Beautiful Young Woman Long
prompt: A breathtaking cinematic scene of a beautiful young woman with long flowing dark hair standing gracefully in a golden wheat field during a dramatic storm. She wears an elegant, flowing white dress billowing in the wind, looking up serenely towards the sky with a peaceful expression. Powerful golden sun rays burst through a dramatic break in the dark, heavy storm clouds, illuminating her and the swaying golden grass around her. Moody atmosphere with high contrast between the ominous dark clouds and the radiant sunlight. Photorealistic, epic composition, volumetric god rays, cinematic lighting, highly detailed, 8k, masterpiece --ar 3:4 --stylize 250 --v 6
